ddls:
CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "recency_months" INTEGER /* Number of months since the last donation */,
  "frequency_times" INTEGER /* Total number of times the donor has donated blood */,
  "monetary_cc_blood" INTEGER /* Total amount of blood donated in cubic centimeters (cc) */,
  "time_months" INTEGER /* Total number of months the donor has been active */,
  "donated_in_march_2007" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the donor donated blood in March 2007 */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Donor's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Donor's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Donor's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Donor's gender */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Donor's blood type */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Donor's contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Donor's email address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Donor's address */,
  "last_donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last donation */,
  "next_donation_prediction" TEXT /* Predicted date of the next donation */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the donor */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "donor_segment" TEXT /* Segment of the donor (e.g., high-frequency, occasional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_history" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor who made the donation */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the donation */,
  "donation_amount_cc" INTEGER /* Amount of blood donated in cubic centimeters (cc) */,
  "donation_site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the donation was made */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation (e.g., whole blood, plasma, platelets) */,
  "donation_status" TEXT /* Status of the donation (e.g., completed, canceled) */,
  "donation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the donation */,
  "donation_test_results" TEXT /* Results of the blood tests performed on the donation */,
  "donation_batch_id" TEXT /* Batch ID for the donation (for inventory management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donation_history_donation_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("donation_site_id") REFERENCES donation_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the donation site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the site */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., fixed, mobile) */,
  "site_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of donors the site can handle at a time */,
  "site_open_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the site */,
  "site_features" TEXT /* Features of the site (e.g., parking, wheelchair access) */,
  "site_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site */,
  "site_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  "site_manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the site manager */,
  "site_manager_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the site manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)
